violations.text: An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (sliced tomatoes) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Food items were voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Employee placed gloves on to complete the rest of their task. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment is to add an allergen awareness sentence to menu. Establishment made corrections to menu. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023
